message:
feat: add temporal analytics to stats command (xf-11.2.1)

Implements comprehensive temporal analytics for the stats command:
- New stats_analytics.rs module with TemporalStats struct
- SQL-based aggregations for daily/hourly/DOW distributions
- Sparkline visualization using Unicode block characters
- Gap detection to find longest inactive periods
- Activity patterns: most active day, hour, average tweets/day
- New --temporal flag for stats command
- Both JSON and text output formats supported

All quality gates pass: cargo check, clippy, fmt, and 135 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
